description: Commit-stage slow-test budget for the full Vitest regression lane. Adjust thresholds intentionally when test class legitimately grows.

notes.perTestMs: Fail when any single Vitest case exceeds this duration (default 120s).
notes.perFileMs: Fail when any test file total exceeds this duration (default 480s / 8 min). CI integration-heavy script files (e.g. orchestrator-wake-supervisor, testmode-fleet-reaper) legitimately approach this on cold GHA runners; raise only with documented justification.
